note: Mock news signals for Monzo Bank Limited (categorised, for use_mock=true)

signals.headline: FCA issues requirements notice to Monzo over AML controls
signals.summary: The FCA issued requirements to Monzo Bank Limited to address weaknesses in anti-money laundering systems and controls identified during a supervisory review. Monzo must implement remediation by Q3 2024.

signals.headline: Monzo discloses data incident affecting customer contact details
signals.summary: Monzo disclosed an incident involving unauthorised access to customer contact information via a third-party tool. No payment card or account data was compromised. ICO notified.

signals.headline: Monzo appoints new CFO ahead of anticipated IPO
signals.summary: Monzo Bank named a new Chief Financial Officer, widely interpreted as a step toward a public listing on the London Stock Exchange. Incoming CFO joins from a major UK investment bank.

signals.headline: Monzo narrows losses as annual revenues grow 80% to over GBP 700m
signals.summary: Monzo Bank reported improved results with revenues growing 80% year-on-year. Net loss narrowed by 40%. The bank moved closer to sustained profitability for the first time.

signals.headline: Monzo raises GBP 430m in Series I funding round at GBP 5bn valuation
signals.summary: Monzo Bank completed a GBP 430 million funding round led by US institutional investors, valuing the challenger bank at approximately GBP 5 billion and extending its runway for international expansion.
